items.title: VUG: Mag 7 Now The Lag 7, Better Valuation, Weaker Chart
items.description: US large-cap growth stocks, particularly the Russell 1000 Growth Index, are in correction territory, with the Lag 7 stocks all down year-to-date.

items.title: Stock Market Slump Offers Potential Cure To Stubbornly High U.S. Inflation
items.description: The S&P 500 in mid-March fell more than 10% from its all-time high reached Feb. 19, a market drop likely hurting the highest-earning households.
